description: Signature patterns for resolving GameAssembly.dll anchors. Update after each client patch.

patterns.note: Only stable plaintext type name found in GameAssembly.dll; use as RE anchor.
Present in global-metadata.dat body; not in GameAssembly.dll as plaintext.
Formatted combat lines in heap — used by text_scan harvest mode.
Heal lines in heap — text_scan harvest mode.

structured_queue.notes: Populate offsets in combat_struct.json after Ghidra RE. When enabled, harvester reads IL2CPP List<ChatMessageEntry> instead of scanning text.
